Though out the Act, for the words "State Government", wherever they occur. the word "Administrator" shfl!l bo substituted . 2. In section 1, in sub-section (2). for the word "Assom", the words "the Union Territory of Trlpura" Fhail be substituted. 3. For section 2, the following section shall be substituted, namely;— "2. Definitions.—In this Act,— (1) 'Administrator' means the Administrator of the Union Territory of Trlpura appointed by the President under article 230 of the Con- stitution; (2) 'disturbed area' means an area which is for the time being declared by notification under section 3 to be a disturbed area."
